 #fork:bhk  Also, the "Retry" Telegram copy button doesn't currently get the right auto-generated names.
Can we start auto-adding `%n:<retried_agent_name>.r<N>` to the text that gets copied? Think this through thoroughly and create a plan using your `/sase_plan` skill before making any file changes.
